data.title: Tether-backed Plasma mainnet beta launches Sept 25
data.description:
The Plasma blockchain, designed just for stablecoins, will launch its mainnet beta on September 25.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/plasma-mainnet-beta-launches-sept-25/

data.title: PayPal's stablecoin PYUSD expands to seven new chains including Aptos, Avalanche, Sei, and Tron via LayerZero
data.description: Cointelegraph reported on the X platform that PayPal's stablecoin, PYUSD, has been expanded to Abstract, Aptos, Avalanche, Ink, Sei, Stable, and Tron via LayerZero's Stargate Hydra. This expansion brings its total coverage to nine blockchains, with the existing version being upgraded to PYUSD 0 for global distribution and interoperability.

data.title: EU Commissioner pledges to advance pension and cryptocurrency reforms this year
data.description: The European Union has set a year-end target for further measures to boost pension investments and streamline trading processes, in an effort to inject momentum into the revival of Europe's capital markets. EU Financial Services Commissioner Albuquerque announced the plan on Thursday. She also announced that the European Commission is considering granting direct supervisory authority to the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), its top market regulator based in Paris. She stated that with the transfer of supervisory authority to ESMA, the Commission will consider the feasibility of centralized oversight of certain market infrastructures, such as central counterparties, central securities depositories, and trading venues. She added that emerging sectors such as crypto asset service providers would also benefit from more centralized oversight, and emphasized that this move would not weaken the role of national regulators. (Jinshi)

data.title: Titan Completes $7 Million Seed Round, Led by Galaxy Ventures
data.description: Titan, the DEX aggregator in the Solana ecosystem, announced the completion of a $7 million seed round led by Galaxy Ventures, with participation from Frictionless, Mirana, Ergonia, Auros, and Susquehanna. The new funding will accelerate Titan's work to build a comprehensive portal for the internet capital markets—designed specifically for traders seeking superior execution on Solana. Solana traders face fragmented liquidity and a growing number of aggregators, making it difficult to consistently find the best prices. Titan consolidates all major aggregators and routers into a single platform, properly compares quotes, and provides full transparency to support consistently competitive trade execution. After months of private testing, during which it processed over $1.5 billion in spot trading volume, Titan is now publicly available to all traders.

data.title: Japan's core inflation slows in August but remains above central bank target
data.description: Data released on Friday showed Japan's core consumer price index rose 2.7% in the year to August, still above the Bank of Japan's 2% target, but the smallest increase in nine months, suggesting Japanese households are getting some relief from rising living costs. The data will be among the factors the Bank of Japan will scrutinize at its two-day meeting that ends on Friday. The BOJ board is widely expected to hold interest rates steady at 0.5% at the meeting.

data.title: Decentralized exchange GRVT completes $19 million Series A funding round, led by ZKsync and Further Ventures
data.description: GRVT, a hybrid decentralized exchange based on ZKsync, announced the completion of a $19 million Series A funding round. This round was co-led by GRVT's technology partner, ZKsync, and Further Ventures, an investment firm backed by the Abu Dhabi Sovereign Wealth Fund. The GRVT mainnet Alpha version will officially launch on Ethereum's Layer 2 network, ZKsync, by the end of 2024. As a hybrid decentralized exchange, GRVT aims to combine the high performance of centralized exchanges with the security and transparency of decentralized exchanges to provide users with a superior trading experience. GRVT plans to use the new funds to expand its product offerings, including cross-exchange vaults, cross-chain interoperability, options markets, and real assets.

data.title: White House considering more nominees to lead CFTC
data.description: With Brian Quintenz's confirmation process for the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) chairman stalled, the White House is considering more candidates to lead the regulatory agency. People familiar with the matter said discussions about a new round of potential candidates for the CFTC chairmanship have intensified in recent weeks. Possible contenders include government officials focused on cryptocurrency policy. (Bloomberg)

data.title: DeFi Technologies' Valour Launches New Bitcoin-Collateralized ETP on London Stock Exchange
data.description: As the UK gradually relaxes restrictions on digital assets, Valour, a subsidiary of DeFi Technologies, has launched a Bitcoin staking ETP on the London Stock Exchange, providing investors with the opportunity to earn crypto income. The Bitcoin staking ETP has an annual yield of 1.4%, is backed by Bitcoin stored in cold wallets, and uses multi-party computing (MCP) technology for security. Currently, this new Bitcoin staking ETP is only available to institutional and professional investors. The UK will allow retail investors to purchase cryptocurrency ETNs again on October 8, lifting the ban that has been in place since 2021. The announcement did not specify how the income is generated. However, another Bitcoin ETP listed by Valour on the French exchange generates Bitcoin income by delegating tokens on Core Chain. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Ondo Global Markets TVL exceeds US$240 million
data.description: TheStreet published an article on the X platform stating that Ondo Global Markets' total locked value (TVL) has exceeded US$240 million, making it the world's largest tokenized securities platform.

data.title: ASTER will be listed on Binance Alpha at 16:00 (UTC+8)
data.description: Aster announced on the X platform that ASTER tokens will be available for withdrawal on Aster Spot at 9:00 AM UTC on September 19th (UTC+8), and will be listed on Binance Alpha at 4:00 PM UTC on the same day. Additionally, Aster Pro now offers ASTER futures trading, supporting up to 4x leverage.

data.title: XRP, Dogecoin ETFs among best debuts of the year with $55 million in combined volume
data.description:
'Good sign for the onslaught of 33 Act ETFs coming soon,' Bloomberg Senior ETF Analyst Eric Balchunas said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/371352/xrp-dogecoin-etfs-among-best-debuts-of-the-year-with-55-million-in-combined-volume?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Warsaw Stock Exchange Launches Poland's First Bitcoin ETF
data.description: According to PANews, the Warsaw Stock Exchange has introduced Poland's first Bitcoin ETF, marking a significant advancement in cryptocurrency adoption in Eastern Europe. This ETF provides Polish investors with the opportunity to gain exposure to Bitcoin through standard brokerage accounts.

data.title: REX-Osprey XRP ETF Achieves Record Trading Volume on Debut
data.description: According to PANews, the REX-Osprey XRP ETF, trading under the ticker XRPR, recorded a trading volume of $37.7 million on its first day. The fund, listed in the United States, offers direct exposure to XRP. Eric Balchunas noted on X that its debut trading volume surpassed that of IVES, making it the largest among ETFs launched in 2025. On the same day, the REX-Osprey Dogecoin ETF also debuted, achieving a trading volume of $17 million, placing it among the top five of the 710 funds listed this year.

data.title: Bank of Canada Proposes Stablecoin Regulation Framework
data.description:
Canada's central bank pushes for stablecoin regulation to modernize payment systems and safeguard consumers, aligning with global trends.
source: https://coincu.com/362990-canada-stablecoin-regulation-framework-2

data.title: White House Scrambles for New Crypto CFTC Pick After Winklevoss Backlash
data.description:
The White House has reconsidered its CFTC leadership pick after Brian Quintenz’s stalled nomination and Winklevoss backlash, reviewing new candidates with experience in crypto and digital asset regulation.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/white-house-scrambles-for-new-crypto-cftc-pick-after-winklevoss-backlash/

data.title: Kevin Durant Regains Access to Bitcoin Held in Coinbase Account
data.description:
Earlier this week, the NBA star's agent and business partner, Rick Kleiman, told a conference audience that Durant had been unable to access his account.
source: https://decrypt.co/340285/kevin-durant-access-bitcoin-coinbase-account

data.title: U.S. Supreme Court to hear challenge to Trump’s global tariffs on November 5
data.description:
The U. S. Supreme Court will hear a case on November 5, 2025, about Donald Trump’s global tariffs.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/court-to-hear-challenge-to-trumps-tariffs/

data.title: Nubank Plans to Integrate Stablecoin Payments with Credit Cards
data.description: According to PANews, Roberto Campos Neto, the chairman of Brazilian digital bank Nubank and former head of the Central Bank of Brazil, has revealed plans to integrate a dollar-pegged stablecoin and credit card payment functionality. Campos Neto stated that Nubank intends to begin testing stablecoin payments via credit cards as part of a broader effort to connect digital assets with banking services. He also highlighted the challenge banks face in finding ways to accept tokenized deposits and use these assets to extend credit to customers.

data.title: PayPal's Stablecoin PYUSD0 Integrates with Sei Network for Enhanced Financial Settlements
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, PayPal's native stablecoin, PYUSD0, is set to integrate seamlessly with the Sei Network using LayerZero's cross-chain technology. This integration aims to enhance the global financial settlement layer by introducing PayPal's stablecoin capabilities. Through the Sei Network, PYUSD0 will achieve sub-second finality, institutional-grade throughput, and high composability in both DeFi and capital markets.

PYUSD0 is built on LayerZero's decentralized messaging protocol to meet global economic demands, ensuring seamless movement across different networks without liquidity fragmentation. This positions PYUSD0 not only as a payment tool but also as a universal asset driving applications, chains, and markets. This development aligns with the trend of institutions like BlackRock, Franklin Templeton, and JPMorgan bringing real-world assets onto the blockchain.

The combination of PayPal's extensive user base, LayerZero's interoperability, and Sei's high performance allows PYUSD0's integration with Sei to deepen the fusion of mainstream payments and on-chain markets. Global users will benefit from PayPal's stability while completing transactions at the fastest Layer1 speed.

data.title: Nubank to let users pay with stablecoins via credit cards
data.description:
Brazilian digital bank Nubank reportedly aims to add support for dollar-pegged stablecoins and credit card payments.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nubank-to-let-users-pay-with-stablecoins/
